title: EV demand is getting a boost from the Iran war — just as auto giants pivot back to combustion engines
summary_full: Various car selling platforms have reported a sharp increase in consumer interest for EVs since the Middle East crisis began.
summary_public: Various car selling platforms have reported a sharp increase in consumer interest for EVs since the Middle East crisis began.

IR.label: neutral
IR.evidence: EV demand is getting a boost from the Iran war
